# Redmine 6.1.1 stable -- Redmine::AccessControl.permissions.map(&:name)
# Generated from sandbox: docker exec redmine rails runner
# Includes core permissions plus any plugin permissions loaded in the sandbox.
# The advertised-scope guard treats this as a superset: every advertised scope must appear here.
